notes: Reticle and display marks are visible before the track box/label becomes clearly associated with the target.
Large cyan track box appears around the reticle/target region; label is visible at the right box edge beginning around 23s.
Display state changes from full box to corner brackets while the bright target moves near the label; exact values are compression-limited.
Cyan meter-suffix label remains adjacent to the bright target; exact first glyph varies in compressed public frames.
Label remains visible near the target through target brightening/saturation; exact two-character reads are bounded manual reads.
